task_completion.description: Update Call Number for Turing's 'On Computable Numbers' paper
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero interface, the paper with 'Computable Numbers' in the title has its 'Call Number' field set to 'BOX-TURING'. This can be seen in the right-hand item pane or in a custom list column.

task_completion.description: Update Call Number for Turing's 'Computing Machinery' paper
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero interface, the paper with 'Computing Machinery' in the title has its 'Call Number' field set to 'BOX-TURING'.

task_completion.description: Update Call Number for Shannon's 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication' paper
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero interface, the paper titled 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication' (sole author Shannon) has its 'Call Number' field set to 'BOX-SHANNON'.

task_completion.description: Update Call Number for Shannon and Weaver's 'The Mathematical Theory of Communication' paper
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero interface, the paper titled 'The Mathematical Theory of Communication' (authors Shannon and Weaver) has its 'Call Number' field set to 'BOX-SHANNON'.

task_completion.description: Update Call Number for Einstein's 'On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies' paper
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero interface, the paper with 'Electrodynamics' in the title has its 'Call Number' field set to 'BOX-RELATIVITY'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Zotero GUI to make the changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Zotero application interface being interacted with, rather than a terminal window or SQLite database browser.

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts or direct database manipulation
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent running python scripts or sqlite3 commands in the terminal to update the zotero.sqlite file directly.

integrity.description: The agent modified the existing authentic records
integrity.visual_evidence: The records being modified should be the pre-existing historical papers with full titles and authors, not newly created dummy items.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Target papers and their expected Call Numbers:
1. Turing: 'On Computable Numbers...' -> BOX-TURING
2. Turing: 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence' -> BOX-TURING
3. Shannon: 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication' -> BOX-SHANNON
4. Shannon & Weaver: 'The Mathematical Theory of Communication' -> BOX-SHANNON
5. Einstein: 'On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies' -> BOX-RELATIVITY
